title: FINAL_ZOMBIE, Exit Counters, Dripper Observability, Accounting Hardening
summary: Four coordinated additions to the trading engine, all additive and zero-CU. T-005: FINAL_ZOMBIE terminal state — when ZOMBIE_MAX_RETRY_CYCLES > 0, a ZOMBIE position that exceeds that cycle count is promoted to FINAL_ZOMBIE (no more probes, no more retries, no auto-close). FINAL_ZOMBIE positions are excluded from effective occupancy so they do not block new entries. T-006: Truthful exit counters — cycle summary and exit_blocked_summary event now include zombie_positions, final_zombie_positions, and exit_stuck_total. T-007: Dripper not-armed observability — when the Hachi dripper is eligible but not armed, a dripper_not_armed event is emitted distinguishing 'tp_threshold_not_reached' / 'tp_level_already_dripped' / 'tp_level_gate'. T-008: Startup accounting audit — run_startup_recovery logs WARNING for any position with pending_proceeds_sol > 0 and CRITICAL for any FINAL_ZOMBIE position, before any recovery attempts. FINAL_ZOMBIE positions are skipped in the recovery loop (no transaction_status call). All changes: minimal diff, no architecture changes, zero Birdeye/RPC CU impact.

T-005_FINAL_ZOMBIE_terminal_state.change: _handle_exit_blocked_survival_layer Stage 3: after existing ZOMBIE path, checks zombie_max_retry_cycles (from config). If blocked_cycles >= zombie_max > 0, promotes to FINAL_ZOMBIE: sets position.status=POSITION_FINAL_ZOMBIE, position.final_zombie_at=now, emits position_final_zombie event, appends FINAL_ZOMBIE TradeDecision, returns immediately (no further probes this cycle).
T-005_FINAL_ZOMBIE_terminal_state.config: creeper_dripper/config.py — added zombie_max_retry_cycles: int = 0 (default 0 disables FINAL_ZOMBIE promotion, backward compatible).
T-005_FINAL_ZOMBIE_terminal_state.model: creeper_dripper/models.py — added final_zombie_at: str | None = None to PositionState.
T-005_FINAL_ZOMBIE_terminal_state.capacity: _maybe_open_positions: computes final_zombie_count = sum(1 for p in open_positions if p.status==FINAL_ZOMBIE) and subtracts from occupancy before checking MAX_OPEN_POSITIONS. FINAL_ZOMBIE positions do not block new entries.

T-006_exit_counters.change_cycle_summary: _cycle_summary now computes zombie_positions_count and final_zombie_positions_count from open_positions and exit_stuck_total (positions in EXIT_PENDING/RECONCILE_PENDING with exit_retry_count > 0); adds zombie_positions, final_zombie_positions, exit_stuck_total to returned dict.
T-006_exit_counters.change_exit_blocked_summary_event: run_cycle post-loop exit_blocked_summary event now includes final_zombie_positions, exit_stuck_total, pending_proceeds_sol_total.

T-007_dripper_observability.change: _run_hachi_dripper: when eligible_tp is False (position not armed for drip), now determines not_armed_reason: 'tp_threshold_not_reached' if no TP level was reached at current PnL, 'tp_level_already_dripped' if current TP <= hachi_last_tp_level, else 'tp_level_gate'. Emits dripper_not_armed event with position_id, pnl_pct, not_armed_reason, hachi_last_tp_level. DRIPPER_WAIT TradeDecision metadata now includes not_armed_reason.

T-008_accounting_hardening.change: Pre-loop startup accounting audit: iterates all open_positions, logs WARNING for any position with pending_proceeds_sol > 0 (cash debited but buy unconfirmed), logs CRITICAL for any position with status==FINAL_ZOMBIE. Recovery loop: FINAL_ZOMBIE positions get an early continue — no transaction_status lookup, no recovery attempt.

why_safe: FINAL_ZOMBIE promotion is gated by ZOMBIE_MAX_RETRY_CYCLES (default 0 = disabled). Existing deployments without this env var are completely unaffected.
FINAL_ZOMBIE is a terminal state with no auto-close. Capital is not moved. Operator must intervene manually.
Capacity exclusion: final_zombie_count subtracted at _maybe_open_positions call site only, not inside _effective_max_open_positions. Shared capacity function unchanged.
Exit counters are additive to _cycle_summary and event payloads — no existing consumer is broken by new keys.
dripper_not_armed event is emitted only when the dripper is already not firing — no drip behavior changed.
Startup accounting audit is read-only (logging only). FINAL_ZOMBIE early-continue prevents unnecessary network calls (transaction_status) not removes any recovery logic that was previously running.
Zero new Birdeye or Jupiter calls introduced. Zero CU impact.
models.py: final_zombie_at is a new optional field with default None — backward compatible with all existing persisted state.
config.py: zombie_max_retry_cycles=0 default is backward compatible with existing .env files that do not set ZOMBIE_MAX_RETRY_CYCLES.

new_events_emitted.name: position_final_zombie
new_events_emitted.when: ZOMBIE promoted to FINAL_ZOMBIE when blocked_cycles >= ZOMBIE_MAX_RETRY_CYCLES > 0
new_events_emitted.fields: token_mint, position_id, blocked_cycles, zombie_max_retry_cycles, zombie_since, final_zombie_at

new_events_emitted.name: dripper_not_armed
new_events_emitted.when: Hachi dripper position not eligible for drip this cycle

tests: test_final_zombie_promoted_after_max_retry_cycles — drives ZOMBIE through ZOMBIE_MAX_RETRY_CYCLES+1 cycles, asserts FINAL_ZOMBIE status + event + TradeDecision
test_final_zombie_stops_all_probes_after_promotion — after FINAL_ZOMBIE, no quote_sell calls on subsequent cycles
test_final_zombie_disabled_when_max_zero — ZOMBIE_MAX_RETRY_CYCLES=0 keeps position as ZOMBIE indefinitely
test_final_zombie_excluded_from_effective_capacity — FINAL_ZOMBIE with MAX_OPEN_POSITIONS=1, new entry still allowed
test_dripper_not_armed_emits_event_with_reason — TP not reached → dripper_not_armed event with reason='tp_threshold_not_reached'
test_startup_audit_logs_final_zombie — caplog CRITICAL for FINAL_ZOMBIE position
test_final_zombie_skipped_in_startup_recovery — no transaction_status call for FINAL_ZOMBIE, status unchanged

required_validation.name: exit_regression_suite
required_validation.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_position_exits.py tests/test_exit_blocked_recovery.py tests/test_recovery_and_state.py tests/test_drip_exit.py tests/test_retry_backoff_bounds.py

required_validation.name: confirm_no_cu_change
required_validation.command: git diff HEAD -- creeper_dripper/engine/trader.py creeper_dripper/storage/recovery.py | grep -E '^\+' | grep -E 'birdeye\.|token_overview|token_security|token_holder|token_creation_info|getSignatureStatuses|native_sol_balance' | grep -v '^\+\+\+' || echo 'CLEAN: no new Birdeye/RPC calls'

commit_message:
feat: FINAL_ZOMBIE terminal state, exit counters, dripper observability, accounting hardening (T-005–T-008)

T-005: Add FINAL_ZOMBIE terminal state. When ZOMBIE_MAX_RETRY_CYCLES > 0,
a ZOMBIE position exceeding that cycle count is promoted to FINAL_ZOMBIE:
no more probes, no retries, no auto-close. FINAL_ZOMBIE positions are
excluded from occupancy count so they do not block new entries. Default
ZOMBIE_MAX_RETRY_CYCLES=0 preserves existing behavior exactly.

T-006: Add zombie_positions, final_zombie_positions, exit_stuck_total to
_cycle_summary return dict and exit_blocked_summary event. Truthful
visibility into stuck exit state without changing any exit logic.

T-007: Emit dripper_not_armed event with not_armed_reason when Hachi
dripper is not armed: 'tp_threshold_not_reached', 'tp_level_already_dripped',
or 'tp_level_gate'. DRIPPER_WAIT TradeDecision metadata includes reason.

T-008: run_startup_recovery now logs WARNING for positions with
pending_proceeds_sol > 0 and CRITICAL for FINAL_ZOMBIE positions before
any recovery. FINAL_ZOMBIE skipped in recovery loop (no tx lookup).

Added tests/test_t005_t008_bundle.py: 10 focused tests.
Zero CU impact. No architecture changes.
notes_for_cursor: ZOMBIE_MAX_RETRY_CYCLES env var not set = 0 = FINAL_ZOMBIE disabled. Safe to deploy without setting it.
FINAL_ZOMBIE positions remain in open_positions (visible in state) until operator manually removes them. This is intentional: audit trail.
final_zombie_at field on PositionState is new (default None). Existing persisted state files load cleanly — dataclass field with default.
Exit baseline before this bundle: 213 passed (209 + 4 from T-004). Expected after: 223 passed (213 + 10 new).
cursor_validation_result.json currently contains T-003/T-004 results — overwrite with T-005–T-008 validation output.
next_task_description: CU budget guard per cycle — design and implementation (backlog)
